Resumé

This page tells you a little bit about me (i.e. it’s my resumé). All my cool projects can be found here. My home address is Randersvej 559, 8380 Trige, Denmark. I can be reached via e-mail here or on phone/Signal/WhatsApp: 0045 30 14 08 07.

Experience

Member of the Local Liason Commitee, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

June 2022 - now

  • The local liaison committee is a collective body comprising management and employee representatives from the department, which deals with cooperation between management and employees.

Visiting Doctoral Student, Teachers College, Columbia University

February 2022 - May 2022

  • Visiting the Transformative Learning Technologies Lab at Teachers College, Columbia University. Hosted by Prof. Paulo Blikstein. Designing and writing about cool stuff.

PhD Fellow, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

November 2019 - now

  • Researching how to design learning tools for Machine Learning that empowers students in critically engaging with it in their everyday lives.

Research Assistant, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

July 2019 - November 2019

  • Research at the Center for Computational Thinking and Design at Aarhus University

Student Helper, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

November 2018 - July 2019

  • Responsible for website, coordination and other assorted tasks at Center for Computational Thinking and Design at Aarhus University

Student Guidance Counsellor, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

May 2016 - January 2019

  • Counsellor for IT-Product Development, Computer Science and Bioinformatics
  • Individual Guidance, Talks and Recruiting Engangements

Teaching Assistant, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

January 2016 - July 2017

  • In the courses Experimental Systems Development and Interaction Design

Sales Assistant, Customer Service & Technical Support, Hi-Fi Klubben A/S

February 2013 - February 2017

  • Europe’s largest specialty retail chain for high-fidelity audio equipment

Education

MSc. IT-Product Development, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

August 2017 - July 2019

  • Based at the Department of Computer Science and in collaboration with the Department of Engineering. Students take a combination of courses from both departments related to computer science and industrial design
  • Personal focus on Human-Computer Interaction and Constructive Design Research.
  • Master’s Thesis about Computational Thinking and designing learning tools for Machine Learning in secondary education.

BSc. IT, Dept. of Computer Science, Aarhus University

August 2014 - July 2017

  • The Bachelor’s degree in IT- Product Development is based on fundamental computer science in combination with topics in the field of design.

Volunteering

Board Member and Treasurer, Red-Green Alliance in Northern Aarhus

2020 - now

  • Eco-socialist political party in Denmark.

Co-founder and Board Member, IT-Tutor

2016 - 2017

  • Organisation managing the introductory week for new students at the IT Product Development Bachelor’s Programme

Organizer and Responsible for Logistics, AUHack

2016 - 2017

  • Denmark’s largest hackathon

Chairperson, SOFA-IT

2016-2016

  • Student Organisation at the IT-Product Development BSc and MSc Programmes, arranging social and educational events.

Research / Professional Interests

  • Computational Thinking & Empowerment
  • Ethics and Politics in Technology
  • Participatory Design
  • Constructive Design Research
  • Human-Computer Interaction

Personal Interests

  • Video Games
  • Design and Making
  • Photography
  • Road Cycling
